devdoc.details: Implements the Q402 protocol: sign-to-pay gasless ERC-20 transfers.  Architecture (EIP-7702 flow):  ┌──────────┐  sign EIP-712   ┌─────────────────────────────┐  │  User    │ ───────────────▶ │  Q402PaymentImplementation  │  │  (EOA)   │                  │  (deployed implementation)  │  └──────────┘                  └─────────────────────────────┘       │                                    │       │  EIP-7702 delegation               │ verifies sig       ▼                                    │ transfers token  ┌──────────┐  Type-0x04 tx   ┌───────────▼─────────────────┐  │Facilitator│ ──────────────▶ │   User EOA (delegated code) │  │(gas sponsor)│               │   IERC20.transfer(...)      │  └──────────┘                  └─────────────────────────────┘  EIP-712 domain name : "Q402 BNB Chain"  Witness type        : TransferAuthorization  Chain ID            : 56 (BNB Chain Mainnet)  Gas token           : BNB

domainSeparator().details: Uses `address(this)` — under EIP-7702 delegation this equals the      user's EOA, making the signature bound to a specific user.WARNING: Under EIP-7702 delegated execution, `address(this)` is the      user's EOA, NOT the implementation contract address. Do NOT call this      helper from a normal (non-delegated) context and expect the same value      as during EIP-7702 execution — the verifyingContract will differ.

hashTransferAuthorization(address,addres.details: WARNING: Under EIP-7702 delegated execution, `address(this)` is the      user's EOA. Calling this from a non-delegated context (e.g., a script      targeting the implementation address directly) will produce a different      digest than what the user actually signs. Always call via the user's EOA.

transferFromWithAuthorization(address,ad.details: Fallback for chains without EIP-7702 support.      User calls approve(thisContract, amount) once off-chain,      then Facilitator calls this to execute the transfer.      Domain verifyingContract = address(this) (the implementation contract).

transferWithAuthorization(address,addres.details: Called by the Facilitator (who pays AVAX gas) after setting the      EIP-7702 delegation on the user's EOA.      Under EIP-7702: `address(this)` == user's EOA, so IERC20.transfer()      sends tokens directly from the user's balance without allowance.

params.amount: Token amount in smallest units (e.g. 50000 for 0.05 USDC).
params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which the signature is invalid.
params.nonce: Unique per-owner nonce for replay protection.
params.owner: Token owner — the user whose EOA is delegated.
params.token: ERC-20 token contract address (e.g. USDC.e on Avalanche).
params.witnessSignature: EIP-712 signature produced by the user's wallet.

devdoc.title: Q402PaymentImplementationBNB

TransferExecuted(address,address,address.notice: Emitted on every successful gasless transfer

domainSeparator().notice: Returns the EIP-712 domain separator for this chain.

hashTransferAuthorization(address,addres.notice: Compute the EIP-712 digest for off-chain pre-verification.

transferFromWithAuthorization(address,ad.notice: Permit2-mode: gasless transfer using pre-approved allowance.

transferWithAuthorization(address,addres.notice: Execute a gasless ERC-20 transfer via EIP-7702 delegation.

usedNonces(address,uint256).notice: Tracks used nonces per owner — prevents replay attacks
